detail.description: Sam Haggerty flies out to right fielder Jac Caglianone.
Sam Haggerty singles on a soft ground ball to pitcher Seth Lugo.
Sam Haggerty pops out to catcher Christian Vázquez in foul territory.
Sam Haggerty grounds out to first baseman Ildemaro Vargas.
Sam Haggerty singles on a ground ball to center fielder Trent Grisham. Ezequiel Duran scores.
Sam Haggerty singles on a sharp ground ball to center fielder Trent Grisham.
Sam Haggerty bunt grounds out softly, pitcher Max Fried to first baseman Ben Rice.
Sam Haggerty pops out to first baseman Ben Rice.
Sam Haggerty flies out to left fielder Tyler Soderstrom.
Sam Haggerty grounds out to first baseman Nick Kurtz.
Sam Haggerty pops out to first baseman Nick Kurtz in foul territory.
Sam Haggerty singles on a soft bunt ground ball to pitcher Jeffrey Springs. Danny Jansen to 3rd. Evan Carter to 2nd.
Sam Haggerty grounds out sharply, second baseman Adam Frazier to first baseman Vaughn Grissom.
Sam Haggerty flies out to right fielder Jo Adell.
Sam Haggerty grounds into a force out, second baseman Oswald Peraza to shortstop Zach Neto. Justin Foscue out at 2nd.
Sam Haggerty pops out to first baseman Nolan Schanuel in foul territory.
Sam Haggerty doubles (1) on a line drive to left fielder Troy Johnston.
Sam Haggerty grounds into a double play, shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to second baseman Edouard Julien to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Justin Foscue out at 2nd. Sam Haggerty out at 1st.
Sam Haggerty grounds out, shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to first baseman TJ Rumfield.
Sam Haggerty grounds out, second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt. Danny Jansen to 2nd.
Sam Haggerty grounds out, shortstop Max Schuemann to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt.
Sam Haggerty flies out to left fielder Cody Bellinger.
Sam Haggerty lines out to left fielder Otto Kemp.
Sam Haggerty singles on a ground ball to left fielder Otto Kemp.
Sam Haggerty flies out to center fielder Leody Taveras.
Sam Haggerty singles on a line drive to center fielder Leody Taveras.
Sam Haggerty grounds out, second baseman Alex Freeland to first baseman Freddie Freeman.
Sam Haggerty flies out to center fielder Lawrence Butler.
